scripts.link:cli: bun run build:cli && cd packages/cli && bun link
scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/database/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test
